name: BraTS 2021
segmentation_detail: enhancing tumor, tumor core, whole tumor
description: Multi-parametric MRI of adult glioma with expert tumor sub-region segmentations and MGMT methylation status; also mirrored on TCIA and Kaggle.

label_schema: Evaluated regions: Whole Tumor (1+2+4), Tumor Core (1+4), Enhancing Tumor (4)
details.file_structure: One folder per case: BraTS2021_XXXXX/ with _t1.nii.gz, _t1ce.nii.gz, _t2.nii.gz, _flair.nii.gz and _seg.nii.gz (all co-registered, skull-stripped, 1mm³).
details.extra: Classification track adds a per-subject binary MGMT promoter methylation label (CSV).

name: BraTS-Africa
full_name: BraTS 2023: Glioma Segmentation in Sub-Saharan Africa
segmentation_detail: enhancing tumor, necrotic core, peritumoral edema
description: Multi-parametric brain MRI of glioma and other CNS tumor patients from Sub-Saharan Africa with expert tumor annotations.

name: BraTS-Mets
segmentation_detail: enhancing tumor, non-enhancing core, FLAIR hyperintensity
description: Pre-treatment multi-parametric MRI of brain metastasis patients with expert tumor sub-region segmentations.

name: BraTS-PEDs
segmentation_detail: enhancing tumor, tumor core, whole tumor
description: Multi-parametric MRI of pediatric brain tumor patients with expert tumor sub-region segmentations.

name: BraTS-MEN
segmentation_detail: enhancing tumor, non-enhancing core, FLAIR hyperintensity
description: Pre-operative multi-parametric MRI of intracranial meningioma patients with expert tumor segmentations.

name: UPenn-GBM
paired_text_detail: structured clinical, genomic and radiomic data (not reports)
segmentation_detail: tumor subregions and whole-brain masks
description: Multiparametric MRI from 630 glioblastoma patients with expert-corrected tumor and whole-brain segmentations plus clinical, genomic and survival data.

name: ISLES 2022
segmentation_detail: expert ischemic stroke lesion masks
description: Multi-center MRI of 250 acute/sub-acute ischemic stroke cases with DWI, ADC and FLAIR and expert lesion segmentations (NIfTI/BIDS).

details.file_structure: BIDS layout: sub-strokeXXXX/ses-*/ with dwi, adc, flair NIfTI + derivatives/ holding msk.nii.gz.

name: ATLAS R2.0
full_name: Anatomical Tracings of Lesions After Stroke, Release 2.0
segmentation_detail: manual whole-brain stroke lesion masks
description: Large open T1-weighted MRI stroke dataset with manually traced lesion masks, accessed after agreeing to terms of use.

name: WMH Segmentation Challenge
full_name: MICCAI 2017 White Matter Hyperintensity Segmentation Challenge
segmentation_detail: manual binary white matter hyperintensity masks
description: Multi-scanner brain MRI of 60 subjects with co-registered FLAIR and T1 and manual white matter hyperintensity annotations.

name: MSSEG-2
full_name: MICCAI 2021 MS New Lesions Segmentation Challenge
segmentation_detail: masks of new MS lesions at follow-up
description: Longitudinal 3D FLAIR MRI of 100 MS patients for detecting and segmenting newly appearing lesions.

name: Shifts MS
segmentation_detail: consensus white matter MS lesion masks
description: Multi-center white matter MS lesion dataset with FLAIR and T1 and consensus masks aggregating several cohorts.

name: EPISURG
full_name: EPISURG: Postoperative MRI for Resection Neurosurgery in Epilepsy
segmentation_detail: resection cavity masks by 3 raters (~200 subjects)
description: Anonymized postoperative brain MRIs from 430 refractory epilepsy patients with resection-cavity segmentations.

name: ADNI
multi_sequence_detail: T1w, T2/FLAIR, plus FDG, amyloid (PiB/AV45) and tau PET
description: Longitudinal multimodal MRI and PET with genetics, cognition and biomarkers for Alzheimer's disease, shared after application review.

name: OASIS-1
full_name: Open Access Series of Imaging Studies, Cross-sectional
segmentation_detail: brain masks and tissue segmentations in processed subset
description: Cross-sectional T1-weighted brain MRI from 416 subjects with clinical dementia ratings.

name: OASIS-3
full_name: Open Access Series of Imaging Studies, Longitudinal Multimodal
multi_sequence_detail: T1w, T2w, FLAIR, ASL, SWI, TOF, BOLD fMRI, DTI, plus PiB, AV45, FDG, tau PET
segmentation_detail: FreeSurfer segmentation and PUP-processed PET derivatives
description: Longitudinal multimodal MRI (incl. fMRI, DTI) and amyloid/metabolic/tau PET for normal aging and Alzheimer disease.

name: IXI
multi_sequence_detail: T1, T2, PD-weighted, MRA, and DWI (15 directions)
description: Multi-sequence brain MRI (T1, T2, PD, MRA, DWI) from nearly 600 healthy subjects at three London hospitals.

name: ABIDE
multi_sequence_detail: resting-state fMRI plus anatomical T1-weighted MRI
description: Aggregated resting-state fMRI and structural MRI with phenotypic data from individuals with autism and typical controls.

name: HCP Young Adult
full_name: Human Connectome Project — WU-Minn Young Adult (1200 Subjects)
multi_sequence_detail: 3T T1w, T2w, resting-state and task fMRI, HARDI diffusion; 7T and MEG subsets
segmentation_detail: FreeSurfer cortical/subcortical segmentations and surface parcellations
license: HCP Open Access Data Use Terms
description: High-resolution multimodal 3T/7T MRI (structural, fMRI, diffusion) from ~1200 healthy young adults.

name: RSNA 2019 ICH Detection
description: Over 25,000 non-contrast head CT exams labeled for presence and five subtypes of acute intracranial hemorrhage.

name: RSNA 2025 Aneurysm Detection
full_name: RSNA Intracranial Aneurysm Detection AI Challenge 2025
multi_sequence_detail: CT angiography, MR angiography, T1 post-contrast and T2-weighted MRI
segmentation_detail: ~200 studies include aneurysm segmentations
description: Multi-modality brain studies from 18 sites annotated for aneurysm presence and location across 13 arterial territories.

name: CQ500
description: 491 head CT scans with consensus reads by three radiologists for hemorrhage, fractures, midline shift and mass effect.

name: ADAM
multi_sequence_detail: TOF-MRA plus one structural MR image (T1, T2 or FLAIR)
segmentation_detail: binary masks of unruptured intracranial aneurysms
description: TOF-MRA challenge for detecting and segmenting unruptured intracranial aneurysms with a hidden test set.

name: CADA
full_name: Cerebral Aneurysm Detection and Analysis Challenge 2020
segmentation_detail: aneurysm center positions and segmented masks; rupture state
description: 3D rotational X-ray angiography volumes from 115 patients with aneurysm locations, segmentations and rupture status.

name: INSTANCE 2022
full_name: 2022 Intracranial Hemorrhage Segmentation on Non-Contrast head CT
segmentation_detail: voxel-level intracranial hemorrhage masks
description: MICCAI 2022 benchmark for 3D intracranial hemorrhage segmentation on non-contrast head CT with expert voxel labels.

name: VerSe
segmentation_detail: voxel masks of individual vertebrae (C1-L6 + sacrum)
description: MICCAI 2019-2020 challenge with spine CT, per-vertebra segmentation masks and vertebral centroid keypoints.

label_schema: Per-vertebra integer masks: 1–7 cervical (C1–C7), 8–19 thoracic (T1–T12), 20–25 lumbar (L1–L6), 26 sacrum, 28 T13 variant
details.file_structure: Per scan: *_ct.nii.gz, *_seg.nii.gz and *_ctd.json (centroids).

name: RSNA 2022 Cervical Spine Fracture
full_name: RSNA 2022 Cervical Spine Fracture Detection Challenge
segmentation_detail: vertebral-level masks for a subset; fracture presence/level labels
description: Large public adult cervical-spine CT dataset with fracture presence/level annotations and vertebral segmentation for a subset.

name: Calgary-Campinas CC-359
segmentation_detail: skull-stripping masks and hippocampus segmentations
description: Multi-vendor, multi-field-strength T1w brain MRI of 359 adults with skull-stripping and hippocampus masks plus raw k-space.

name: Mindboggle-101
segmentation_detail: manually labeled cortical (DKT) and subcortical structures
description: Largest collection of free, manually labeled human brain MRI surfaces and volumes using the DKT cortical protocol.

name: fastMRI Brain
full_name: NYU Langone & FAIR fastMRI Brain Dataset
description: Large collection of fully-sampled raw k-space and DICOM brain MRIs (T1/T2/FLAIR) for accelerated MRI reconstruction research.

name: MRBrainS
multi_sequence_detail: T1-weighted, T1 inversion recovery, and T2-FLAIR
segmentation_detail: brain tissue (GM, WM, CSF) and up to ten structures
description: MICCAI multi-sequence 3T brain MRI challenge for segmenting gray matter, white matter and CSF in elderly subjects.

name: iSeg
segmentation_detail: infant brain tissue (WM, GM, CSF)
description: MICCAI challenge with T1/T2 MRI of 6-month-old infants (isointense phase) and manual WM/GM/CSF tissue labels.

name: FeTA
full_name: Fetal Tissue Annotation and Segmentation Dataset
segmentation_detail: seven fetal brain tissues
description: First public dataset of super-resolution reconstructed fetal brain MRI with manual multi-tissue annotations.

name: NIH ChestX-ray14
paired_text_detail: 14 disease labels text-mined from reports (reports not released)
description: 112,120 frontal chest X-rays from 30,805 patients labeled with 14 thoracic findings via NLP, plus 984 hand-drawn bounding boxes.

label_schema: 14 binary disease labels (NLP-mined): Atelectasis, Cardiomegaly, Effusion, Infiltration, Mass, Nodule, Pneumonia, Pneumothorax, Consolidation, Edema, Emphysema, Fibrosis, Pleural_Thickening, Hernia
details.file_structure: 1024×1024 PNGs + Data_Entry_2017.csv (labels, patient age/sex/view) + train_val/test split lists.

name: CheXpert
full_name: CheXpert: Large Chest Radiograph Dataset with Uncertainty Labels
paired_text_detail: 14 labels from a rule-based labeler; free-text reports in the separate CheXpert Plus release
description: 224,316 chest radiographs from 65,240 Stanford patients labeled for 14 observations as positive, negative or uncertain.

label_schema: No Finding, Enlarged Cardiomediastinum, Cardiomegaly, Lung Opacity, Lung Lesion, Edema, Consolidation, Pneumonia, Atelectasis, Pneumothorax, Pleural Effusion, Pleural Other, Fracture, Support Devices
details.file_structure: Patient/study/view JPEG hierarchy + train.csv / valid.csv with the 14 label columns and view metadata.

name: MIMIC-CXR
paired_text_detail: free-text English radiology reports, one per study
description: 377,110 DICOM chest radiographs from Beth Israel Deaconess paired with de-identified free-text radiology reports.

label_schema: Free-text reports (per study .txt): sections incl. FINDINGS and IMPRESSION
Derived CheXpert & NegBio label CSVs (14 categories, in MIMIC-CXR-JPG)
details.file_structure: p1x/pXXXXXXXX/sYYYYYYYY/ folders with DICOMs + a matching sYYYYYYYY.txt report; metadata CSV links study→view→labels.

name: MIMIC-CXR-JPG
full_name: MIMIC-CXR-JPG — chest radiographs with structured labels
paired_text_detail: structured CheXpert & NegBio labels (14 categories); reports live in companion MIMIC-CXR
description: JPG-converted derivative of MIMIC-CXR with structured CheXpert and NegBio labels across 14 categories.

name: PadChest
full_name: PadChest: chest X-ray dataset with multi-label annotated reports
paired_text_detail: Spanish free-text reports; ~27% labels manually annotated, rest by RNN; UMLS-mapped
description: 160,868 16-bit chest X-rays paired with Spanish reports and 174 findings, 19 diagnoses and 104 location labels mapped to UMLS.

name: VinDr-CXR
full_name: VinDr-CXR: chest X-rays with radiologist annotations
paired_text_detail: radiologist bounding boxes and image-level labels; no reports
description: 18,000 DICOM chest radiographs with radiologist bounding boxes for 22 local findings and 6 global labels.

name: VinDr-PCXR
paired_text_detail: lesion-level bounding boxes and image-level labels; no reports
description: Pediatric chest X-ray dataset of 9,125 DICOM studies annotated with lesion-level boxes for 36 findings and 15 diseases.

name: RSNA Pneumonia Detection
description: Frontal chest radiographs in DICOM with radiologist bounding boxes localizing lung opacities indicative of pneumonia.

name: SIIM-ACR Pneumothorax
segmentation_detail: pixel-level pneumothorax masks (RLE)
description: Chest radiographs in DICOM with run-length-encoded segmentation masks marking pneumothorax regions.

name: Open-i / Indiana University CXR
full_name: Indiana University Chest X-ray Collection (NLM Open-i)
paired_text_detail: de-identified free-text reports (indication, findings, impression) with MeSH/RadLex
description: Open NLM collection of frontal/lateral chest radiographs paired with de-identified reports, widely used for report generation.

name: Shenzhen Hospital CXR Set
full_name: Shenzhen No.3 People's Hospital Chest X-ray Set (NLM TB)
paired_text_detail: brief radiologist clinical readings as text files
description: 662 frontal chest radiographs from Shenzhen labeled normal or tuberculosis for TB screening research.

name: Montgomery County CXR Set
full_name: Montgomery County Chest X-ray Set (NLM TB)
paired_text_detail: brief radiologist clinical readings as text files
segmentation_detail: left/right lung segmentation masks
description: 138 frontal chest radiographs from Montgomery County's TB program, labeled normal or TB with lung segmentation masks.

name: Object-CXR
full_name: object-CXR: Foreign Objects on Chest X-rays
segmentation_detail: foreign objects annotated with boxes/ellipses/polygons
description: 10,000 chest X-rays from Chinese township hospitals annotated for foreign objects; now distributed via GitHub.

name: CANDID-PTX
paired_text_detail: anonymized free-text radiology reports
segmentation_detail: RLE masks for pneumothorax, acute rib fracture, and intercostal chest tubes
description: New Zealand chest radiographs with segmentation for pneumothorax, rib fractures and chest tubes plus free-text reports.

name: BRAX
full_name: BRAX, a Brazilian labeled chest X-ray dataset
paired_text_detail: 14 CheXpert-style labels from NLP on Portuguese reports (reports not provided)
description: Brazilian chest X-ray dataset of 40,967 images (Hospital Albert Einstein) in DICOM and PNG with 14 automatically extracted labels.

name: BIMCV-COVID19
paired_text_detail: Spanish free-text radiographic reports, UMLS-mapped findings
segmentation_detail: semantic segmentation of findings for a small subset
description: Large Valencian COVID-19 dataset with chest X-rays and CT plus Spanish reports, UMLS-coded findings and PCR/serology results.

name: COVID-19 Radiography Database
segmentation_detail: lung segmentation masks for all images
description: Kaggle chest X-ray database of 21,165 images across COVID-19, Normal, Lung Opacity and Viral Pneumonia classes with lung masks.

name: COVIDx CXR
description: Open benchmark chest X-ray dataset built by COVID-Net from multiple public sources, labeled COVID-19 / non-COVID pneumonia / normal.

name: LIDC-IDRI
full_name: Lung Image Database Consortium and Image Database Resource Initiative
segmentation_detail: nodule contours from four thoracic radiologists (XML)
description: 1,018 thoracic CT scans with lesion markups and subjective nodule characteristic ratings from four radiologists.

label_schema: Per-nodule contours from up to 4 radiologists (no forced consensus)
Subjective characteristics (1–5): subtlety, calcification, sphericity, margin, lobulation, spiculation, texture, malignancy
details.file_structure: DICOM image series per patient + one XML per scan holding each reader's nodule contours and characteristic ratings.
details.splits: No official split (1,018 scans); LUNA16 defines a 10-fold subset.

name: LUNA16
segmentation_detail: whole-lung masks plus nodule center coordinates and diameters
description: 888 CT scans derived from LIDC-IDRI with 1,186 nodule annotations for detection and false-positive reduction.

label_schema: annotations.csv — nodule center (x,y,z world coords) + diameter_mm, for nodules accepted by ≥3/4 radiologists
candidates_V2.csv — candidate locations with class 0/1 for false-positive reduction
details.file_structure: 888 CT volumes as .mhd/.raw (MetaImage), organized in 10 subsets for cross-validation.

name: NSCLC-Radiomics
paired_text_detail: clinical outcome data (survival, stage, histology) in CSV; not free-text reports
segmentation_detail: radiation-oncologist gross tumor volume (GTV-1) as DICOM RTSTRUCT/SEG
description: Pretreatment CT from 422 NSCLC patients with tumor delineations and outcome data, used to build a prognostic radiomic signature.

name: NSCLC-Radiogenomics
paired_text_detail: clinical/demographic data, semantic tumor annotations, matched genomic data; not free-text reports
multi_sequence_detail: multi-modality CT and PET/CT with genomic profiling
segmentation_detail: tumor segmentation maps on CT
description: 211 NSCLC patients with CT and PET/CT, tumor segmentations and matched genomic data (RNA-seq, mutation status).

name: RSNA-STR Pulmonary Embolism CT
segmentation_detail: exam- and slice-level PE annotations only
description: Large chest CT pulmonary angiography (CTPA) dataset with expert PE annotations from the RSNA 2020 challenge.

name: LNDb
segmentation_detail: nodule segmentation masks with multiple radiologist annotations
description: CT lung nodule database of 294 scans from Porto with radiologist nodule annotations, segmentations and Fleischner scores.

name: MosMedData
full_name: MosMedData: Chest CT with COVID-19 Related Findings
segmentation_detail: binary masks of ground-glass opacities and consolidations (~50 studies)
description: 1,110 anonymized Moscow chest CT studies with COVID-19 severity grades and lesion masks for a small subset.

name: COVID-19-CT-Seg
full_name: COVID-19 CT Lung and Infection Segmentation Dataset
segmentation_detail: left lung, right lung and infection regions
description: 20 COVID-19 chest CT scans with radiologist-verified masks for left lung, right lung and infection.

name: NLST
segmentation_detail: core imaging has none; IDC offers some harmonized segmentations
other_labels: screening results and outcomes via CDAS
description: Low-dose chest CT screening exams from the National Lung Screening Trial, with full trial clinical data available via NCI CDAS.

name: Lung-PET-CT-Dx
full_name: Large-Scale CT and PET/CT Dataset for Lung Cancer Diagnosis
segmentation_detail: tumor locations as bounding boxes (PASCAL VOC XML)
description: CT and PET/CT DICOM from 355 lung cancer patients with radiologist bounding-box tumor annotations and biopsy-confirmed subtypes.

name: EMPIRE10
full_name: Evaluation of Methods for Pulmonary Image Registration 2010
segmentation_detail: reference lung boundary, fissure and landmark annotations for evaluation
description: Thoracic CT registration challenge providing 30 intra-subject chest CT scan pairs with lung, fissure and landmark references.

name: ACDC
segmentation_detail: LV cavity, RV endocardium, LV myocardium at ED and ES
description: Cine cardiac MRI from 150 patients across 5 diagnostic classes with LV/RV/myocardium segmentations and disease labels.

label_schema: Per-patient diagnosis: normal, MINF, DCM, HCM, ARV (5 classes)
details.file_structure: patientXXX/ with 4D cine NIfTI + frames at ED and ES, each with a _gt.nii.gz label. Info.cfg holds ED/ES frame numbers and diagnosis.

name: M&Ms
full_name: Multi-Centre, Multi-Vendor & Multi-Disease Cardiac Image Segmentation Challenge
segmentation_detail: LV/RV blood pool, LV myocardium at ED and ES
description: Generalization challenge with cine CMR from 375 patients scanned on four vendors across Spain, Germany and Canada.

label_schema: Label 3 — RV blood pool (annotated at ED and ES)
details.file_structure: Per subject NIfTI cine + label; metadata CSV gives vendor (A–D), centre and pathology.

name: M&Ms-2
full_name: Multi-Disease, Multi-View & Multi-Center Right Ventricular Segmentation Challenge
segmentation_detail: LV/RV blood pool, LV myocardium at ED and ES
description: Extension of M&Ms focused on right-ventricle segmentation from multi-view cine CMR of 360 subjects.

name: EMIDEC
full_name: Evaluation of Myocardial Infarction from Delayed-Enhancement Cardiac MRI
paired_text_detail: per-patient clinical metadata (age, sex, ECG, troponin)
segmentation_detail: myocardium, infarct, no-reflow area
description: 150 short-axis DE-MRI exams with myocardium and infarct contours plus clinical data, from University Hospital of Dijon.

name: MyoPS 2020
full_name: Myocardial Pathology Segmentation Combining Multi-Sequence CMR
multi_sequence_detail: aligned bSSFP cine + LGE + T2-weighted CMR
segmentation_detail: scar, edema, normal myocardium, LV/RV blood pool
description: Aligned three-sequence (bSSFP/LGE/T2) CMR from 45 patients for myocardial scar and edema segmentation.

name: Sunnybrook Cardiac Data
full_name: Sunnybrook Cardiac Data (2009 LV Segmentation Challenge)
segmentation_detail: LV endocardium, epicardium, papillary muscles at ED and ES
description: 45 cine cardiac MRI cases (healthy and pathological) with expert LV contours, released public domain.

name: MM-WHS
segmentation_detail: LV/RV/LA/RA cavities, LV myocardium, aorta, pulmonary artery
description: Whole-heart segmentation with 60 cardiac CT/CTA and 60 MRI volumes and labels for seven cardiac substructures.

name: LAScarQS 2022
full_name: Left Atrial and Scar Quantification & Segmentation Challenge
segmentation_detail: left atrium cavity and atrial scar
description: Multi-center LGE-MRI of atrial-fibrillation patients for left-atrium and atrial-scar segmentation.

name: Atria Seg 2018
segmentation_detail: left atrium cavity
description: 154 3D LGE-MRI scans of atrial-fibrillation patients with expert left-atrium segmentations.

name: MSD Heart (Task02)
segmentation_detail: left atrium
description: Task02 of the Decathlon: 30 mono-modal cardiac MRI volumes with left-atrium labels.

name: RVSC
segmentation_detail: RV endocardium and epicardium at ED and ES
description: Right-ventricle endo/epicardium segmentation from short-axis cine MRI of 48 patients.

name: CMRxRecon
multi_sequence_detail: multi-contrast: cine, T1 mapping, T2 mapping; SAX and 2/3/4-chamber
segmentation_detail: cardiac segmentation labels alongside k-space
description: Multi-contrast, multi-coil raw k-space cardiac MRI from 300 subjects with segmentation labels for accelerated reconstruction.

name: ASOCA
segmentation_detail: coronary lumen masks, centerlines and vessel radius
description: Coronary CTA from 40 subjects (20 normal, 20 diseased) plus 20 test cases with expert coronary segmentation masks and centerlines.

name: ImageCAS
full_name: ImageCAS: Large-Scale Coronary Artery Segmentation Dataset
segmentation_detail: left and right coronary artery lumen
description: Large-scale coronary artery segmentation benchmark of 1,000 CCTA volumes with radiologist-annotated coronary masks.

name: orCaScore
multi_sequence_detail: paired non-contrast calcium-scoring CT and CTA per patient
segmentation_detail: coronary calcification lesion annotations with vessel assignment
description: Automatic coronary artery calcium scoring on cardiac CT from 72 patients across four scanners/vendors.

name: COCA (Stanford)
full_name: COCA — Coronary Calcium and Chest CTs
multi_sequence_detail: gated coronary CT and non-gated chest CT
segmentation_detail: coronary artery calcium masks on gated CT
description: 789 gated coronary CT scans with calcium segmentations plus 214 non-gated chest CTs with calcium scores.

name: AVT
full_name: Aortic Vessel Tree CTA Dataset Collection
segmentation_detail: aortic vessel tree and branches
description: Multicenter collection of 56 CTA scans covering the full aortic vessel tree with ground-truth segmentation masks.

name: MSD Liver (Task03)
segmentation_detail: liver + liver tumor
description: Portal-venous CT volumes with liver and tumor masks (shares imaging with the LiTS challenge).

details.file_structure: Decathlon layout: imagesTr/, labelsTr/, imagesTs/ + dataset.json describing modality and labels.
details.extra: All 10 MSD tasks share this folder convention and NIfTI format.

name: MSD Pancreas (Task07)
segmentation_detail: pancreas + pancreatic tumor
description: Abdominal CT with pancreatic parenchyma and tumor annotations.

name: MSD Spleen (Task09)
segmentation_detail: spleen
description: Portal-venous CT volumes with spleen segmentation masks.

name: MSD Colon (Task10)
segmentation_detail: primary colon cancer
description: CT volumes with primary colon cancer segmentation.

name: MSD Hepatic Vessel (Task08)
full_name: Medical Segmentation Decathlon — Task08 Hepatic Vessel
segmentation_detail: hepatic vessels + liver tumor
description: Liver CT with hepatic vasculature and tumor annotations.

name: MSD Prostate (Task05)
segmentation_detail: central gland + peripheral zone
description: Multiparametric prostate MRI (T2W + ADC) with central gland and peripheral zone masks.

name: BTCV / Synapse Multi-organ
full_name: Beyond the Cranial Vault Abdomen Multi-Organ Segmentation
segmentation_detail: 13 organs (spleen, kidneys, gallbladder, esophagus, liver, stomach, aorta, IVC, veins, pancreas, adrenals)
description: Widely used benchmark of 30 abdominal CT scans annotated with 13 organs.

label_schema: 13 organs: spleen, R/L kidney, gallbladder, esophagus, liver, stomach, aorta, IVC, portal & splenic vein, pancreas, R/L adrenal gland
details.file_structure: img/ and label/ folders of NIfTI volumes; labels are integer-coded organ maps.

name: AMOS22
multi_sequence_detail: multi-center, multi-vendor, multi-phase CT and MRI
segmentation_detail: 15 abdominal organs
description: Large multi-modality (CT + MRI) abdominal benchmark with voxel-level annotations of 15 organs.

label_schema: 15 organs: spleen, R/L kidney, gallbladder, esophagus, liver, stomach, aorta, IVC, pancreas, R/L adrenal gland, duodenum, bladder, prostate/uterus
details.file_structure: imagesTr/labelsTr in NIfTI; filename prefix indicates CT vs MRI. dataset.json lists label indices.
details.splits: 200 CT + 40 MRI train (labels) / 100 CT val / 200 CT + 60 MRI test

name: AMOS-MM
paired_text_detail: radiology reports (findings + impression) and 19,562 VQA pairs
description: Chest/abdomen/pelvis CT volumes paired with radiology reports and VQA pairs for vision-language tasks.

name: TotalSegmentator
segmentation_detail: 117 anatomical structures across the whole body
description: Large real-world clinical CT dataset with segmentations of 117 anatomical structures.

label_schema: 117 structures grouped as: 27 organs, 26 vertebrae, 24 ribs, 20+ muscles, cardiovascular (aorta, heart chambers, pulmonary artery), and more
Each structure is a separate binary NIfTI mask (multilabel also provided)
details.file_structure: Per subject: ct.nii.gz + segmentations/ folder with one <structure>.nii.gz per class.

name: KiTS19
segmentation_detail: kidney + kidney tumor
description: Arterial-phase abdominal CT of kidney cancer patients with kidney and tumor segmentations.

name: KiTS21
full_name: 2021 Kidney and Kidney Tumor Segmentation Challenge
segmentation_detail: kidney + tumor + cyst
description: Kidney CT dataset adding cyst annotations, with an external-institution test set.

name: KiTS23
full_name: 2023 Kidney and Kidney Tumor Segmentation Challenge
multi_sequence_detail: late arterial and nephrogenic contrast phases
segmentation_detail: kidney + tumor + cyst
description: Largest KiTS cohort with kidney, tumor and cyst masks including nephrogenic-phase scans.

label_schema: Hierarchical eval regions: Kidney+Masses, Masses (tumor+cyst), Tumor
details.file_structure: One folder per case (case_00000/) with imaging.nii.gz and segmentation.nii.gz.

name: LiTS
segmentation_detail: liver + liver tumor lesions
description: Contrast-enhanced liver CT with liver and tumor annotations from multiple institutions.

details.file_structure: volume-*.nii and segmentation-*.nii pairs (NIfTI).

name: CHAOS
multi_sequence_detail: MRI: T1-DUAL in/opposed-phase, T2-SPIR; plus abdominal CT
segmentation_detail: liver (CT); liver + spleen + kidneys (MRI)
description: Healthy-subject abdominal CT and multi-sequence MRI for single and multi-organ segmentation.

name: WORD
segmentation_detail: 16 organs incl. liver, spleen, kidneys, stomach, pancreas, duodenum, colon, bladder
description: Whole-abdomen CT with dense pixel-level annotations of 16 organs, released for academic research by application.

name: FLARE21
full_name: MICCAI 2021 Fast and Low-resource Abdominal Organ Segmentation
segmentation_detail: liver, kidney, spleen, pancreas
description: Multi-center abdominal CT for efficient four-organ segmentation from 11 medical centers.

name: FLARE22
segmentation_detail: 13 abdominal organs
description: Semi-supervised abdominal CT benchmark with a large unlabeled pool for 13-organ segmentation.

name: FLARE23
segmentation_detail: 13 abdominal organs + pan-cancer (any lesion)
description: Partially-labeled abdominal CT challenge for joint 13-organ and pan-cancer tumor segmentation.

name: Pancreas-CT (NIH)
segmentation_detail: pancreas (manual slice-by-slice)
description: 82 portal-venous abdominal CT scans with manual pancreas segmentations, a classic pancreas benchmark.

name: CT-ORG
full_name: CT volumes with multiple organ segmentations
segmentation_detail: liver, lungs, bones, kidneys, bladder
description: 140 heterogeneous CT scans with 3D masks of five organs, sourced partly from PET-CT exams.

name: AbdomenCT-1K
segmentation_detail: liver, kidney, spleen, pancreas
description: Over 1000 multi-center CT scans annotated for liver, kidney, spleen and pancreas.

name: PI-CAI
multi_sequence_detail: bi-parametric MRI: T2W, DWI (high b-value), ADC
segmentation_detail: csPCa lesion delineations + whole-gland annotations
description: Large public bi-parametric prostate MRI cohort with histopathology-linked labels for clinically significant cancer detection.

label_schema: Case-level label: clinically significant cancer yes/no with ISUP grade
details.file_structure: Per case: T2W, high-b DWI and ADC as .mha + annotations (human + AI) in separate folders; clinical CSV with PSA, ISUP, etc.

name: Prostate158
segmentation_detail: prostate zones + cancer lesions
description: Expert-annotated 3T bi-parametric prostate MRI with zonal anatomy and cancer segmentations.

label_schema: Zonal masks: transition/central zone, peripheral zone
details.file_structure: Per case NIfTI: T2W, ADC, DWI + t2_anatomy_reader1.nii.gz and adc_tumor_reader1.nii.gz label files.

name: PROMISE12
segmentation_detail: whole prostate (capsule)
description: Multi-vendor transversal T2-weighted prostate MRI with whole-gland masks, a classic benchmark.

name: ProstateX
multi_sequence_detail: mpMRI: T2W, PD-W, DCE, DWI (b=50/400/800) + ADC
description: Multiparametric prostate MRI with marked lesions for predicting clinical significance of prostate cancer.

name: LLD-MMRI
full_name: Liver Lesion Diagnosis on Multi-phase MRI
multi_sequence_detail: non-contrast, arterial, venous, delayed, T2W, DWI, T1 in/out-of-phase
description: Multi-phase liver MRI for focal liver lesion diagnosis with per-lesion class labels and bounding boxes.

name: CT Colonography
description: Large screening CT colonography collection (prone/supine) with polyp annotations from the ACRIN 6664 trial.

name: MRNet
multi_sequence_detail: sagittal, coronal and axial series per exam
description: 1,370 knee MRI exams from Stanford with binary labels for abnormality, ACL tears and meniscal tears.

label_schema: 3 binary study-level labels: abnormal, ACL tear, meniscal tear
details.file_structure: Per exam: sagittal.npy, coronal.npy, axial.npy (stack of slices, s×256×256) + train/valid label CSVs.

name: fastMRI knee
full_name: fastMRI Knee Raw k-Space and DICOM Dataset
size: >1,500 fully-sampled knee k-space MRIs + 10,000 clinical DICOM knee MRIs (~1.35 TB)
multi_sequence_detail: coronal proton-density with and without fat suppression
description: Raw k-space and DICOM knee MRI data released by NYU and Meta AI for accelerated MRI reconstruction research.

label_schema: No pathology labels — raw fully-sampled multi-coil k-space + reconstructed images for MRI reconstruction
details.file_structure: HDF5 per volume (kspace, reconstruction_rss); singlecoil and multicoil tracks; DICOMs separately.
details.splits: Official train / val / test / challenge splits

name: OAI
size: 4,796 participants, longitudinal bilateral knee MRI and X-ray
multi_sequence_detail: multiple knee MRI sequences (DESS, T2 mapping, TSE) plus radiographs
description: Longitudinal osteoarthritis cohort of 4,796 participants with serial bilateral knee MRI, radiographs and clinical data.

name: MURA
description: Large upper-extremity radiograph dataset covering seven body parts with radiologist normal/abnormal study labels.

name: RSNA Bone Age
description: Pediatric left-hand radiographs labeled with skeletal bone age and sex for bone-age estimation.

name: SKM-TEA
segmentation_detail: 4 tissues (patellar, femoral, tibial cartilage, meniscus)
description: Quantitative double-echo steady-state knee MRI with raw k-space, DICOM, tissue segmentations and pathology bounding boxes.

name: KneeMRI
description: 917 sagittal PD-weighted knee MRI volumes from Rijeka, Croatia, labeled for anterior cruciate ligament condition.

name: Digital Hand Atlas
full_name: Digital Hand Atlas for Skeletal Development
description: Reference collection of ~1,400 normal pediatric hand radiographs across ages, sexes and ethnic groups for bone-age assessment.

name: LERA
description: Lower-extremity radiographs (foot, knee, ankle, hip) from 182 patients with radiologist normal/abnormal labels.

name: RSNA Screening Mammography
full_name: RSNA Screening Mammography Breast Cancer Detection (2023)
description: De-identified screening mammograms (~54,700 DICOM images) with a cancer label and BI-RADS/density metadata for breast-cancer detection.

name: CBIS-DDSM
full_name: Curated Breast Imaging Subset of DDSM
segmentation_detail: ROI masks and bounding boxes for masses and calcifications
description: Curated DICOM-converted subset of DDSM screening mammograms with pathology labels, BI-RADS and ROI segmentations.

label_schema: Pathology: BENIGN / BENIGN_WITHOUT_CALLBACK / MALIGNANT; BI-RADS assessment 0–5; breast density 1–4
ROI segmentation mask + cropped patch per lesion
details.file_structure: DICOM full images + ROI mask + cropped images; CSV descriptors for mass/calc train and test separately.

name: VinDr-Mammo
segmentation_detail: bounding-box annotations for findings (BI-RADS 3-5)
description: Full-field digital mammography benchmark of 5,000 four-view exams with breast-level BI-RADS/density and bounding-box finding annotations.

name: CMMD
description: Mammography database of 1,775 Chinese patients with biopsy-confirmed benign/malignant labels and molecular subtype for a subset.

name: INbreast
segmentation_detail: expert pixel-level lesion contours (XML)
description: Full-field digital mammography database (410 images) from Porto with BI-RADS, density and expert XML lesion contours; access by request.

name: Duke Breast Cancer MRI
full_name: Dynamic Contrast-Enhanced MRI of Breast Cancer Patients (Duke)
multi_sequence_detail: DCE-MRI: non-fat-sat T1, fat-sat pre-contrast and 3-4 post-contrast sequences
segmentation_detail: radiologist 3D bounding boxes around lesions
description: DCE-MRI of 922 invasive breast cancer patients with 3D tumor bounding boxes plus extensive clinical, genomic and radiomic data.

name: Breast-Diagnosis
multi_sequence_detail: 3+ MR pulse sequences (T2, STIR, BLISS) with contrast; plus PET, CT, mammography
description: Multi-modality breast imaging (multi-sequence MR, PET, CT, mammography) for 88 subjects with lesion-type and biomarker data.

name: BCS-DBT
full_name: Breast Cancer Screening — Digital Breast Tomosynthesis
segmentation_detail: bounding boxes for lesions
description: Large digital breast tomosynthesis screening dataset of 5,060 patients with normal/actionable/benign/cancer labels and lesion bounding boxes.

name: ISPY1 (ACRIN 6657)
full_name: Breast DCE-MRI from the I-SPY 1 / ACRIN 6657 trial
multi_sequence_detail: DCE-MRI across 4 neoadjuvant-chemo timepoints; T2 + pre/post-contrast T1
segmentation_detail: functional tumor volume segmentations
description: Multi-center serial DCE-MRI (222 patients, 4 timepoints) with functional tumor volume segmentations for predicting chemotherapy response.

name: ISPY2
multi_sequence_detail: DCE-MRI + T2 across 4 treatment timepoints; derived parametric maps
segmentation_detail: functional tumor volume masks (DICOM SEG)
description: I-SPY 2 trial serial breast DCE-MRI (719 patients, 4 timepoints) with parametric maps and DICOM-SEG functional tumor volume segmentations.

name: BreastDM
full_name: BreastDM: DCE-MRI dataset for breast tumor segmentation and classification
multi_sequence_detail: DCE-MRI with pre-contrast, post-contrast and subtraction sequences
segmentation_detail: tumor segmentation masks (PNG)
description: Breast DCE-MRI dataset of 232 cases with tumor segmentation masks and benign/malignant labels, distributed via GitHub.

name: EMBED
description: Large, racially diverse Emory mammography dataset (2D, C-view and DBT) with 60,000 lesions linked to BI-RADS descriptors and pathologic outcomes.

name: HECKTOR
full_name: HEad and neCK TumOR segmentation and outcome prediction challenge
paired_text_detail: clinical data (age, sex, HPV, treatment) and recurrence-free survival endpoints
segmentation_detail: primary tumor (GTVp) and lymph node (GTVn) contours
description: MICCAI challenge for automatic segmentation of head and neck tumors and lymph nodes and outcome prediction in FDG-PET/CT.

details.file_structure: Per patient: CT.nii.gz, PT.nii.gz (PET) and a GTV label NIfTI; clinical CSV with HPV, treatment and survival.

name: HNSCC
full_name: Head and Neck Squamous Cell Carcinoma (MD Anderson)
paired_text_detail: demographics, risk factors, stage, recurrence, survival and treatment data
segmentation_detail: primary and nodal gross tumor volume contours (RTSTRUCT)
description: TCIA collection of imaging, radiation therapy and clinical data from 627 head and neck squamous cell carcinoma patients at MD Anderson.

name: HN1
paired_text_detail: demographic, follow-up, chemotherapy and survival data
segmentation_detail: pre-treatment gross tumor volume (DICOM SEG and RTSTRUCT)
description: TCIA radiomics collection of pre-treatment CT and clinical/outcome data for 137 head and neck cancer patients from MAASTRO.

name: TCGA-HNSC
full_name: TCGA Head-Neck Squamous Cell Carcinoma Collection
paired_text_detail: matched clinical, pathological and genomic data via TCGA/GDC
segmentation_detail: radiation therapy structures (RTSTRUCT) for a subset
license: CC BY 3.0; some imaging controlled access
description: TCIA imaging collection for 227 head and neck cancer patients matched to genomic and clinical data in The Cancer Genome Atlas.

name: Head-Neck-PET-CT
paired_text_detail: histopathology, tumor grade and follow-up outcomes
segmentation_detail: radiotherapy GTV contours (RTSTRUCT)
description: TCIA collection of FDG-PET/CT and radiotherapy planning CT with GTV contours and outcome data for 298 head and neck cancer patients.

name: RADCURE
full_name: CT Images from a Large Head and Neck Cohort (RADCURE)
paired_text_detail: demographic, diagnosis, treatment and follow-up data with survival status
segmentation_detail: primary GTV, nodal GTV and 19 organs-at-risk contours
description: TCIA head and neck CT dataset of 3,346 patients treated with definitive radiotherapy, with tumor and organ-at-risk contours and outcomes.

name: QIN-HeadNeck
paired_text_detail: clinical data (demographics, treatment, follow-up) in XLSX
segmentation_detail: DICOM SEG segmentations plus DICOM SR quantitative PET/CT results
license: CC BY 3.0; some imaging controlled access
description: TCIA collection of serial pre/post-therapy FDG-PET/CT with DICOM SEG/SR quantitative analysis objects for head and neck cancer.

name: DENTEX
full_name: Dental Enumeration and Diagnosis on Panoramic X-rays (MICCAI 2023)
description: Panoramic dental X-rays hierarchically annotated (FDI) for abnormal-tooth detection with quadrant, enumeration and diagnosis.

name: Tufts Dental Database
full_name: Tufts Dental Database (TDD): multimodal panoramic X-ray dataset
paired_text_detail: radiologist think-aloud text descriptions plus eye-tracking gaze maps
segmentation_detail: teeth masks, maxillomandibular masks and abnormality masks
description: 1,000 expert-annotated panoramic dental radiographs with tooth/abnormality masks plus radiologist eye-tracking and text descriptions.

name: ToothFairy2
segmentation_detail: 42-class 3D masks: teeth (FDI), mandible, maxilla, alveolar canals, sinuses, implants
description: First fully-annotated public CBCT dataset with 42-class 3D expert segmentations of dental and maxillofacial structures at 0.3mm voxels.

name: CTooth
full_name: CTooth: 3D Tooth Volume Segmentation on CBCT
segmentation_detail: 3D tooth-volume voxel masks
description: Fully annotated CBCT tooth-volume segmentation benchmark of 22 volumes, extended by CTooth+ with 146 additional unlabeled volumes.

name: autoPET I
full_name: Automated Lesion Segmentation in Whole-Body FDG-PET/CT (autoPET 2022)
segmentation_detail: manual whole-body FDG-avid tumor lesion masks
description: MICCAI 2022 challenge for automated tumor lesion segmentation on whole-body FDG-PET/CT (900 patients, melanoma/lymphoma/NSCLC and controls).

label_schema: Binary whole-body mask of FDG-avid malignant lesions (0 = background/physiologic uptake, 1 = tumor lesion)
details.file_structure: Per study: CT.nii.gz, SUV.nii.gz (PET SUV), CTres.nii.gz and SEG.nii.gz; also DICOM on TCIA (FDG-PET-CT-Lesions).

name: autoPET III
full_name: Automated Lesion Segmentation in Multitracer PET/CT (autoPET III 2024)
multi_sequence_detail: multi-tracer: FDG and PSMA PET; PET + CT
segmentation_detail: manual whole-body tumor lesion masks for FDG- and PSMA-avid lesions
license: FDG: TCIA Restricted; PSMA: CC BY 4.0
description: Third autoPET edition extending the task to multi-tracer whole-body PET/CT by combining FDG and PSMA collections (1,611 training studies).

name: FDG-PET-CT-Lesions
full_name: Whole-body FDG-PET/CT dataset with manually annotated tumor lesions
segmentation_detail: manual 3D segmentation of FDG-avid malignant lesions (501 positive, 513 controls)
license: TCIA Restricted (DICOM); NIfTI mirror CC BY-NC 4.0
description: TCIA collection of 1,014 whole-body FDG-PET/CT studies with manually annotated tumor lesions, the FDG training data behind autoPET.

name: PSMA-PET-CT-Lesions
full_name: Whole-body PSMA-PET/CT dataset with manually annotated tumor lesions
segmentation_detail: manual 3D segmentation of PSMA-avid tumor lesions (DICOM SEG)
description: TCIA collection of 597 whole-body PSMA-PET/CT studies from 378 prostate-cancer patients with manually annotated lesions.

name: ROCO
paired_text_detail: captions + UMLS concepts (CUIs), keywords
description: Multimodal radiology image-caption dataset mined from PubMed Central Open Access articles, spanning multiple modalities and body regions.

name: ROCOv2
size: 79,789 images with captions and UMLS concepts
paired_text_detail: captions + manually curated UMLS CUIs, keywords
description: Updated multimodal radiology image dataset from PMC Open Access with manually curated modality and anatomy concepts, used in ImageCLEFmedical Caption.

name: MedICaT
full_name: Medical Images, Captions, and Textual References
paired_text_detail: captions, inline textual references and subfigure-subcaption annotations
description: Medical figures with captions, inline references and compound-figure/subcaption annotations extracted from PubMed Central and S2ORC.

name: PMC-OA
paired_text_detail: captions aligned at subfigure/subcaption granularity
description: Large biomedical image-caption archive from PubMed Central Open Access used to pretrain the PMC-CLIP vision-language model.

name: VQA-RAD
paired_text_detail: clinician-generated QA pairs (open- and closed-ended)
description: Radiology VQA dataset of head CT/MRI, chest X-rays and abdominal CTs with clinician-authored question-answer pairs.

name: SLAKE
paired_text_detail: bilingual (English-Chinese) QA pairs, vision- and knowledge-based
segmentation_detail: semantic segmentation masks and object-detection boxes per image
description: Bilingual radiology VQA dataset covering 39 organs and 12 diseases, annotated with segmentation masks, bounding boxes and a medical knowledge graph.

name: MS-CXR
full_name: MS-CXR: Making the Most of Text Semantics
paired_text_detail: radiologist-verified phrases describing findings, paired to bounding boxes
description: Phrase-grounding benchmark over MIMIC-CXR images with radiologist-annotated bounding boxes paired to real report sentences across eight findings.

name: Chest ImaGenome
paired_text_detail: scene-graph relations linking anatomy boxes to report-derived attributes
description: Scene-graph dataset auto-derived from MIMIC-CXR with 29 anatomy bounding boxes, attributes and longitudinal comparison relations per image.

name: REFLACX
full_name: Reports and Eye-Tracking Data for Localization of Abnormalities in Chest X-rays
size: 3,032 eye-tracking + report sessions for 2,616 chest X-rays
paired_text_detail: timestamped dictated report transcriptions synced with gaze data
description: Radiologist eye-tracking and timestamped report transcriptions over MIMIC-CXR images, with bounding boxes and abnormality localizations.

name: Medical-Diff-VQA
paired_text_detail: difference-oriented question-answer pairs comparing paired studies
description: Large difference-VQA dataset derived from MIMIC-CXR for answering questions about changes between a patient's main and reference chest X-rays.

name: RadGenome-ChestCT
size: 25,692 CT volumes with 665K grounded report regions + 1.3M VQA
paired_text_detail: multi-granularity grounded reports and grounded QA pairs linked to regions
segmentation_detail: 197 organ-level segmentation masks per volume linked to report sentences
description: Grounded vision-language extension of CT-RATE adding organ segmentation masks, region-linked reports and grounded VQA pairs for 3D chest CT.

name: INSPECT
full_name: Integrating Numerous Sources for Prognostic Evaluation of Clinical Timelines
size: 23,248 CTPA studies / 19,402 patients with reports and EHR
paired_text_detail: radiology report impressions plus structured longitudinal EHR data
description: Multimodal dataset linking CTPA images, radiology reports and structured EHR at scale for pulmonary embolism diagnosis and prognosis.

name: MAIDA
size: multi-institution chest X-rays across 22+ hospitals in 12 countries
paired_text_detail: DICOM metadata and annotations (endotracheal tube placement, pneumonia)
description: Global data-sharing initiative providing multi-institution chest X-rays for ICU/NICU/ED tasks such as endotracheal-tube and pneumonia assessment.

name: TCIA
description: NCI-funded public archive of de-identified cancer medical images (mostly DICOM) organized into collections by disease, modality or research focus.

name: PhysioNet
paired_text_detail: many datasets pair images with reports/clinical data (e.g. MIMIC-CXR)
description: MIT-hosted repository of physiological and clinical research data, including major credentialed radiology datasets such as MIMIC-CXR and its derivatives.

name: OpenNeuro
description: Free BIDS-compliant repository for openly sharing neuroimaging datasets (MRI, fMRI, EEG, MEG, PET), operated by the Stanford Center for Reproducible Neuroscience.

name: Grand Challenge
segmentation_detail: many hosted challenges provide expert segmentation annotations
description: Open platform for hosting biomedical imaging challenges, expert annotation collection and deployment of deep-learning algorithms.

name: Synapse
description: Sage Bionetworks collaborative research platform hosting biomedical datasets, challenges (incl. BraTS) and imaging benchmarks with governance controls.

name: Zenodo
description: CERN-operated general-purpose open research repository with DOI minting, widely used to publish radiology datasets such as ROCOv2 and TotalSegmentator.

name: Kaggle Datasets
size: hundreds of thousands of public datasets
description: Community data-science platform hosting many public medical-imaging datasets and competitions (e.g. RSNA, chest X-ray challenges).

name: Stanford AIMI
paired_text_detail: several datasets include reports/annotations (e.g. CheXpert, INSPECT)
segmentation_detail: some datasets include expert segmentation/annotation
description: Stanford Center for AI in Medicine and Imaging portal of de-identified, annotated clinical imaging datasets across modalities for non-commercial research.

name: IDC
segmentation_detail: includes image-derived annotations, segmentations and measurements
description: Cloud-based NCI node collocating public cancer imaging collections with Google Cloud analysis tools; no registration required to browse and download.

name: UK Biobank Imaging
multi_sequence_detail: brain multi-sequence MRI (T1, FLAIR, SWI, fMRI, dMRI), cardiac/abdominal MRI, DXA, carotid US
description: World's largest multi-modal imaging study, scanning 100,000 volunteers with brain/cardiac/abdominal MRI, DXA and carotid ultrasound linked to genetic and phenotypic data.

name: Medical Segmentation Decathlon
multi_sequence_detail: includes multi-parametric MRI tasks (brain, prostate) and CT tasks
segmentation_detail: expert voxel-level labels for all 10 tasks
description: Benchmark suite of ten 3D CT/MRI segmentation tasks with expert labels spanning diverse organs and lesions (individual tasks also listed separately).

name: AWS Open Data
full_name: Registry of Open Data on AWS
description: Registry of openly available datasets hosted on AWS S3, including medical imaging resources such as the Medical Segmentation Decathlon and EMBED.

name: Hugging Face
paired_text_detail: hosts many image-text/report/VQA datasets (CT-RATE, RadGenome, VQA-RAD, PMC-OA)
description: Machine-learning dataset hub hosting a large and growing collection of medical imaging and multimodal radiology datasets, some gated behind usage agreements.

name: Radiopaedia
paired_text_detail: case descriptions, findings and teaching text per case
multi_sequence_detail: cases include multi-sequence MRI and multi-modality studies
description: Collaborative open-edit radiology reference and teaching archive with tens of thousands of annotated cases spanning all modalities and body regions.
